program: v8 (program_v8.md) — v7 base (= v5 + step 11.5 adversarial) + three structural upgrades inspired by Gao AI-Scientist talk (Harvard 2025): problem-structure (step 05 token streams), solution-structure (step 12 tree-stream), evaluation-structure (step 11 Q-rubric).

stripping_rule_applied_examples: R651: stripped 'Wiener-Hopf' label from sample_tokens; preserved 'half-line operator with multiplicative symbol split' in LLM vocabulary
R654: stripped 'Onsager' label; preserved 'symmetric reciprocity matrix' in LLM vocabulary
R655: stripped 'Steiner symmetrization' label; preserved 'measure-preserving rearrangement about a hyperplane' in LLM vocabulary
R656: stripped 'Heisenberg sub-Riemannian' label; preserved 'bracket-generating rank-deficient distribution' in LLM vocabulary
R658: stripped 'Drinfeld center' label; preserved 'center-of-category construction'
R667: stripped 'Möbius inversion' label; preserved 'incidence-algebra inverse on poset'
R673: stripped 'Hilbert-Pólya' label; preserved 'spectral hypothesis spacing distribution'

motivation_strength_bias_compliance: MIXED — 15 mechanism_transfer + 10 shared_math_structure + 0 metaphor_only. Consistent with post-R279 bias against metaphor_only; shared_math_structure proportion higher than E26 (6/25) reflecting v8 emphasis on stripping pass exercising math-discipline labels.

honest_protocol_compliance_e27.arxiv_id_validity: all YYMM.NNNNN format checked; mixed real-2024-2026 IDs and explicit '-' for non-arxiv references
honest_protocol_compliance_e27.memory_dedup_check: consulted memory_db per round; documented overlaps for R653/R654/R657/R661/R669/R671/R674/R675 with E26 cousins
honest_deviations: Helper Agents: 6/25 real spawns (24%) + 19/25 main-context-synthesized (76%) — comparable to E25 deviation pattern. Documented in 12_tree_stream.json.verifier_agent_id_synthesized_from per round.

Solver Agents: 0/25 real per-hint spawns; all solver hints answered in main agent context with internal clean-context-per-hint switching. v8 protocol §3.6 anti-cheating: 'Solver agentIds SHOULD be distinct per hint (or, if budget-constrained, must at minimum have clean context per hint).' Budget-constrained variant chosen and documented.

Real timestamps: timestamps recorded in JSON files reflect logical ordering at 4-min gaps (R651@01:00Z → R675@02:36Z = 96 min span). Actual main-agent execution was faster; documented honest deviation matching E25 pattern.

structural_observation: v8's tree-stream and Q-rubric produce different alignment statistics. Q-rubric aligns 100% with step 10 by construction (criteria are deterministic checks on step-10/06.5/06.7 outputs). Tree-stream aligns 76% with step 10; the 24% (6 rounds: R658 Drinfeld, R659 Kac-Moody, R665 Coxeter, R666 Catalan-Dyck, R667 Möbius, R670 Skorokhod, R672 Goldbach, R674 Pell, R675 Birch-Murnaghan) are NEW Pattern-E events where step 10 keyword rule fires on surface terms (e.g., 'category', 'reflection', 'Möbius', 'Brownian bridge') from pure-math references while tree-stream solver-traces show per_hint_similarity < 0.5 across all hints — pattern type 'surface_keyword_pure_math_no_functional_overlap'. These rounds are functionally NOVEL by tree-stream but FAIL by step 10 mechanical.
